subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort in Rajasthan was built during the Mewar dynasty?
question_hi: राजस्थान में मीवर दत्तक केवल कौन सा भविष्यात बनाया गया था?
explanation_en: Amber Fort and Mehrangarh Fort are both located in Jaipur, but Mehrangarh Fort was built during the Mewar dynasty while Amber Fort was built during the Kachhwaha dynasty. Thus, Mehrangarh Fort (option B) is the correct answer.
